case_title: JOSHUA HENZE ET AL VS. HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENZE, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION DBA  PROPERTY MANGEMENT SYSTEMS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO DEC-11-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W.TRUPEK)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY HORNEFF-COHEN, MICHELLE HEARING SET FOR OCT-25-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $31.82 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION DBA  PROPERTY MANGEMENT SYSTEMS
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 12/17/21. DISCHARGE ORDER MAILED TO HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION. FORWARD TO 424 HAMILTON ST., SF. CA 94134

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,885.00 FILED BY HENZE, JOSHUA BONEBRAKE, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION DBA  PROPERTY MANGEMENT SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR EXAMINATION BENCH LETTER ISSUED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PARTIES MADE PAYMENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR ELECTRONICALLY TENDERED FULL PAYMENT OF $621.82 DURING HEARING. PLAINTIFF/JUDGEMENT CREDITOR JOSHUA HENZE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGEMENT DEBTOR MICHELLE HORNEFF-COHEN IS PRESENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA HENZE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DANIEL BONEBRAKE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE HORNEFF-COHEN, PRESIDENT/CFO. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENZE, JOSHUA BONEBRAKE, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION DBA  PROPERTY MANGEMENT SYSTEMS $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.00, THE COURT FINDS THERE WAS NO BAD FAITH IN FAILING TO RETURN THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: AUG-17-2021 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) AS TO THIRD PARTY HORNEFF-COHEN, MICHELLE
ORDER ORDER OF EXAMINATION DISCHARGED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
